article_meta.title: IdeasWhat History Says Will Happen Next in IranMilitant groups have become more violent, specifically against civilians,

reasoning: The model used non-allowed bias type labels, included quoted/attributed language in flagged items, and produced several questionable flags while missing clearer instances in the author's prose.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flag 1 includes Trump’s quoted words; Flag 3 treats Khamenei’s quote as author bias — both violate the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Several flags are overreach or weak: claiming reverential framing from a quoted phrase, inferring bias from citing the author’s own peer-reviewed work, and a dubious framing claim.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clearer author-prose bias such as loaded/idiomatic phrasing ('paying the price'), 'undisciplined hotheads' (subjective/loaded), and colloquial 'not blowing it up' (sensational/word choice).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: All labels used (Framing Bias, Selection Bias, Labeling Bias, Expert Selection Bias) are outside the allowed set, making the type assignments incorrect.
